title: IoT based temp & Conveyor Control
description: Implementation of a real-time IoT-based temperature and conveyor control system for the Foundry Division to optimize production throughput and safety.

title: Energy Monitoring
description: An automated energy monitoring solution for the Irungattukottai facility to track power consumption patterns and identify energy-saving opportunities.

title: Furnace-1 Panel Energy Alert System
description: Developed a specialized alert system and data logger for Furnace-1 panels in the Foundry Division to monitor energy anomalies via IoT.

title: IoT Based Viscosity Data Capturing
description: A multi-oven viscosity monitoring system that captures and analyzes data in real-time to maintain optimal material quality in foundry processes.

title: Universal IoT Trainer Kit
description: Design and development of a custom universal IoT training platform for internal skill development within the Foundry Division.

title: Quality In-house Rejection Dashboard
description: A comprehensive dashboard application to track, visualize, and analyze in-house quality rejections at the Irungattukottai facility.

title: Smart Viscosity Measurement System Using IoT
description: Integration of smart sensors for automated viscosity measurement in glass production, featuring real-time cloud-based monitoring.

title: Safety 4.0 Application Dashboard
description: A Safety 4.0 initiative providing a real-time dashboard for monitoring workplace safety parameters and ensuring industrial compliance.

title: JH 4.0 Application Development
description: Digitizing Jishu Hozen (Autonomous Maintenance) processes through a custom application to improve machine reliability and performance.

title: Sand Plant – Lab Screen Mirroring System
description: Implementation of a centralized lab screen mirroring system and real-time dashboard for Sand Plant monitoring operations.

title: Smart Viscosity Measurement System
description: Automated measurement system for industrial liquids to ensure consistent foundry output quality through precise control.

title: Proto Design & Supply of Low-Cost Energy Meters
description: Prototyping and supply of cost-effective energy meters for distributed power monitoring across foundry operations.

title: Sand Plant Temperature Monitoring
description: Deployment of IoT sensors for continuous temperature monitoring in the sand plant to ensure process stability.

title: Sand Plant Hopper Temperature Monitoring
description: Advanced monitoring and data capturing system for sand plant hoppers to maintain optimal casting temperatures.
